title: The Kraken Priestess
identity: The Truth-Bearer of Nagakabouros, Illaoi wields a massive totem to test the will of her enemies and summon spectral tentacles to fight by her side. She's a high-damage lockdown bruiser who overwhelms enemies with pressure as immense as her faith.
playstyle: Bruiser. The Truth-Bearer of Nagakabouros, Illaoi wields a massive totem to test the will of her enemies and summon spectral tentacles to fight by her side. She's a high-damage lockdown bruiser who overwhelms enemies with pressure as immense as her faith.
strengths: Setplay bruiser identity built around tentacle control.
Strong when she makes the opponent fight in prepared space.
Can reward teams that value sustained pressure over pure speed.
weaknesses: May need help starting offense before setplay is established.
Partner requirements and defensive gaps need more footage.
partnerWants: Lockdown that keeps opponents near tentacles
Partners who convert from prepared-space hits
teamProvides: Setplay bruiser identity built around tentacle control.
Strong when she makes the opponent fight in prepared space.
learningPriorities: Learn tentacle placement and when to fight around it.
Practice pressure sequences that keep the opponent near active threats.
Review partners that hold opponents in her preferred zones.
questions: Who should I pair with this character?
